key_components: ComponentActivity base class for Compose integration
file_insights.architecture_pattern: Jetpack Compose with Hilt Dependency Injection

changes: Activity reference updated from '.MainActivity' to '.ui.MainActivity' to match package structure
file_insights.significance: Package structure refactoring - critical for proper activity resolution

patterns_discovered.impact: Enables field injection and lifecycle-aware dependency management
Modern declarative UI approach with hot preview support
Clear separation of concerns and scalable project structure

patterns_discovered.evidence: InventoryTheme composable wraps content with MaterialTheme
patterns_discovered.impact: Centralized theme management for consistent styling
Enables rapid UI iteration without running emulator

gotchas_discovered.description: When moving MainActivity to a ui subpackage, the manifest reference must be updated from '.MainActivity' to '.ui.MainActivity'
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Always update manifest references when reorganizing package structure

gotchas_discovered.description: InventoryTheme is a wrapper function that doesn't customize MaterialTheme - may need expansion as app grows

quality_metrics.code_documentation: Good - KDoc comments for major components
quality_metrics.compose_practices: Solid - follows Material3 and Compose conventions

deliverables: Updated manifest with correct activity path

recommendations.recommendation: Integrate ViewModel into MainActivity for state management as app complexity grows
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation is suitable for simple screens but will need MVVM structure for real app features

recommendations.recommendation: Extract theme configuration to a dedicated Theme.kt file
recommendations.rationale: Keeps MainActivity focused on activity lifecycle; follows Compose best practices

recommendations.recommendation: Create separate composable files for MainScreen as more features are added
recommendations.rationale: Prevents MainActivity from becoming a large monolithic file

recommendations.recommendation: Implement UI tests for MainActivity and composables using Compose testing framework
recommendations.rationale: Ensure @AndroidEntryPoint injection and Compose behavior work correctly

recommendations.recommendation: Customize MaterialTheme colors, typography, and shapes in theme configuration
recommendations.rationale: Current theme uses defaults; should align with app branding
